hooks.command: printf '<alignment-reminder>Before returning, verify: (1) closed-loop evidence pasted (TRF-R), (2) no unverified failure attribution (fact-driven), (3) no untyped scientific claims, (4) no stall-loops (L3+ 揪头条 if 3+ same-idea cycles). If any rule was violated, name it and correct before finishing.</alignment-reminder>\n'
